title: Company Employee Scraper Input
description: Provide company websites to scrape for employee information.

companyUrls.title: Company URLs
companyUrls.description: List of company website URLs (e.g., https://example.com). The actor will crawl these sites to find team/about pages.

maxPagesPerDomain.title: Max Pages Per Domain
maxPagesPerDomain.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl per company domain. Higher values find more employees but take longer.

emailPatternGuessing.title: Enable Email Pattern Guessing
emailPatternGuessing.description: When enabled, the actor will attempt to guess email addresses using common patterns (first.last@domain.com, etc.) when emails aren't found on the page.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to use for scraping. Recommended for large-scale runs.
